Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************************************

 The Verity double bicategory of profunctors

 In this file, we define the following Verity double bicategory:
 - Objects: univalent categories
 - Horizontal morphisms: functors
 - Horizontal 2-cells: natural transformations
 - Vertical morphisms: profunctors
 - Vertical 2-cells: natural transformations between profunctors
 - Squares: suitably typed natural transformations
 There are several interesting things to notice about this Verity double bicategory.

 First of all, we need to use Verity double bicategories instead of pseudo double
 categories. To get a pseudo double category of profunctors, one needs to use strict
 categories: this is to guarantee that we have a set of functors. However, the type of
 functors between two univalent categories does not form a set, and for that reason, we
 cannot have a pseudo double category.

 Second of all, the underlying horizontal bicategory is `Cat^co` rather than `Cat`. We
 need to reverse the 2-cells to guarantee that the natural transformations are correctly
 typed for the whiskering operations. Compare this to the Verity double bicategory of
 squares where we also had to reverse some 2-cells.

 Third of all, in this Verity double bicategory, the 2-cells coincide with certain squares.
 This is due to the fact they are defined to be natural transformations, just like both the
 horizontal and the vertical 2-cells.

 The data of this bicategory is given in other files. This file collects all of this data
 and puts it together in the shape of a Verity double bicategory. In addition, several
 laws are proven. All of those proofs boil down to technical stuff related to coends.

 Contents
 1. The 2-sided displayed category of the Verity bicategory of profunctors
 2. The vertical bicategory of profunctors
 3. The whiskering operations
 4. More laws
 5. The Verity double bicategory of univalent categories and profunctors
 6. 2-cells versus squares
 7. Companion pairs and conjoints of profunctors
 8. Vertical invertible 2-cells of profunctors
 9. The local univalence of the Verity double bicategory of squares
 10. The global univalence of the Verity double bicategory of squares

 *****************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.CategoryOfSetCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.All.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.SetCoends.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Profunctors.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Profunctors.Examples.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Profunctors.Squares.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Profunctors.Transformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Strictness.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Examples.ProfunctorTwosidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.UnivalenceOp.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.OpCellBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.DoubleBicat.Core.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope double_bicat.

Local Notation "∁" := (op2_bicat bicat_of_univ_cats).

(** * 1. The 2-sided displayed category of the Verity bicategory of profunctors *)

twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor ∁ ∁


twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor ∁ ∁

  
∁ → ∁ → UU
(λ D : ∁ → ∁ → UU,
 ∏ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : ∁,
 D x₁ y₁ → D x₂ y₂ → ∁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧ → ∁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

  
∁ → ∁ → UU
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ : univalent_category), C₁ ↛ C₂).
  
(λ D : ∁ → ∁ → UU,
 ∏ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : ∁,
 D x₁ y₁ → D x₂ y₂ → ∁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧ → ∁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧ → UU)
  (λ C₁ C₂ : univalent_category, profunctor C₁ C₂)
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ D₁ D₂ : univalent_category)
             (P : C₁ ↛ D₁)
             (Q : C₂ ↛ D₂)
             (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
             (G : D₁ ⟶ D₂),
           profunctor_square G F P Q).
Defined.

  univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor


twosided_disp_cat_id_comp
  univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor

  
twosided_disp_cat_id
  univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
(λ _ : twosided_disp_cat_id
         univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor,
 twosided_disp_cat_comp
   univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor) ?pr1

  
twosided_disp_cat_id
  univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
 exact (λ C D P, id_h_profunctor_square P).
  
(λ _ : twosided_disp_cat_id
         univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor,
 twosided_disp_cat_comp
   univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor)
  (λ (C D : ∁)
   (P : univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor C
          D), id_h_profunctor_square P)
 exact (λ C₁ C₂ C₃ D₁ D₂ D₃ P₁ P₂ P₃ F₁ F₂ G₁ G₂ τ₁ τ₂, comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂).
Defined.


twosided_disp_cat_data ∁ ∁


twosided_disp_cat_data ∁ ∁

  
twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor ∁ ∁
(λ D : twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor ∁ ∁,
 twosided_disp_cat_id_comp D) ?pr1

  
twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor ∁ ∁
 exact univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor.
  
(λ D : twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor ∁ ∁,
 twosided_disp_cat_id_comp D)
  univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
 exact univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_id_comp.
Defined.


ver_sq_bicat


ver_sq_bicat

  
bicat
twosided_disp_cat_data ?B ?B

  
bicat
 exact ∁.
  
twosided_disp_cat_data ∁ ∁
 exact univcat_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data.
Defined.

 c : precat_ob_ver_mor univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat,

 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ : univalent_category)

               (Q : C₂ ↛ C₃),
             comp_profunctor P Q).
  
prebicat_2cell_struct
  (precat_ob_ver_mor univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat)
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ : univalent_category) (P Q : C₁ ↛ C₂), profunctor_nat_trans P Q).
Defined.

(a b c

       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)

     ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · g · h ==> f · (g · h)
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : univalent_category)

             (R : C₃ ↛ C₄),

(a b c
 d : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)

(h : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
     ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) ==> f · g · h
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : univalent_category)
             (P : C₁ ↛ C₂)
             (Q : C₂ ↛ C₃)
             (R : C₃ ↛ C₄),
           associator_profunctor_nat_trans P Q R).
  
∏
(a
 b : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(f g
 h : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
     ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> g → g ==> h → f ==> h
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ : univalent_category)
             (P Q R : C₁ ↛ C₂)
             (τ : profunctor_nat_trans P Q)
             (θ : profunctor_nat_trans Q R),
           profunctor_nat_trans_comp τ θ).
  
∏
(a b
 c : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(f : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g1
 g2 : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
        univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ b, c ⟧), g1 ==> g2 → f · g1 ==> f · g2
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ : univalent_category)
             (P : C₁ ↛ C₂)
             (Q₁ Q₂ : C₂ ↛ C₃)
             (τ : profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂),
           lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans P τ).
  
∏
(a b
 c : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(f1
 f2 : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
        univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
     ⟦ b, c ⟧), f1 ==> f2 → f1 · g ==> f2 · g
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ : univalent_category)
             (P₁ P₂ : C₁ ↛ C₂)
             (Q : C₂ ↛ C₃)
             (τ : profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂),
           rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans τ Q).
Defined.

(f

       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f g h
 k : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h)
(z : h ==> k), x • (y • z) = (x • y) • z
∏
(a b
 c : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧), f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)

(a b
 c : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧), id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)
∏
(a b
 c : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h
 i : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)

comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h'

    exact (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_comm (profunctor_nat_trans_id P) Q h h').
  
∏
(a b
 c : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells

       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : g ==> h) (y : h ==> i),
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)

(a b
 c : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells

(f g

(x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i) = (x • y) ▹ i

(a b c
 d : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h
 i : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ c, d ⟧) (x : h ==> i),
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x)

⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
τ: R₁ ==> R₂
(P ◃ (Q ◃ τ)) • lassociator P Q R₂ =
lassociator P Q R₁ • (P · Q ◃ τ)

((P ◃ (Q ◃ τ)) • lassociator P Q R₂) y x h =

((P ◃ (Q ◃ τ)) • lassociator P Q R₂) z w h =
(lassociator P Q R₁ • (P · Q ◃ τ)) z w h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
P: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells

⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
R₁, R₂: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells

⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
τ: R₁ ==> R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
h: (P · (Q · R₁)) z w
∏ (y : C₂) (h : P y (pr2 (z,, w)))
(h' : (Q · R₁) (pr1 (z,, w)) y),
((P ◃ (Q ◃ τ)) • lassociator P Q R₂) z w
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (Q · R₁) y h h') =
(lassociator P Q R₁ • (P · Q ◃ τ)) z w
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (Q · R₁) y h h')

⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
τ: R₁ ==> R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ (y : C₂) (h : P y (pr2 (z,, w)))
(h' : (Q · R₁) (pr1 (z,, w)) y),
((P ◃ (Q ◃ τ)) • lassociator P Q R₂) z w
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (Q · R₁) y h h') =

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
P: profunctor C₁ C₂
Q: profunctor C₂ C₃
R₁, R₂: profunctor C₃ C₄
τ: profunctor_nat_trans R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
h: P x w
h': comp_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P Q R₂ z w
  (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P
     (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans Q τ) z w
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (comp_profunctor Q R₁) x
        h h')) =
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor
  (comp_profunctor P Q) τ z w
  (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P Q R₁ z w
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (comp_profunctor Q R₁) x
        h h'))

P: profunctor C₁ C₂

R₁, R₂: profunctor C₃ C₄
τ: profunctor_nat_trans R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
h: P x w
h': comp_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x
∏ (y : C₃) (h0 : Q y x) (h' : R₁ z y),
(λ h'0 : comp_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x,
 associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P Q R₂ z w
   (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P
      (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans Q τ) z w
      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (comp_profunctor Q R₁)
         x h h'0)))
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q R₁ y h0 h') =
(λ h'0 : comp_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x,
 lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor
   (comp_profunctor P Q) τ z w
   (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P Q R₁ z w
      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (comp_profunctor Q R₁)
         x h h'0)))
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q R₁ y h0 h')

 associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P Q R₂ z w
   (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P
      (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans Q τ) z w
      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (comp_profunctor Q R₁)

 lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor
   (comp_profunctor P Q) τ z w

      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (comp_profunctor Q R₁)

∏
(a b c
 d : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g
 h : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ c, d ⟧) (x : g ==> h),
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)

⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧

  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
τ: Q₁ ==> Q₂
(P ◃ (τ ▹ R)) • lassociator P Q₂ R =
lassociator P Q₁ R • ((P ◃ τ) ▹ R)

∏ (y : C₄) (x : C₁) (h : (P · (Q₁ · R)) y x),
((P ◃ (τ ▹ R)) • lassociator P Q₂ R) y x h =
(lassociator P Q₁ R • ((P ◃ τ) ▹ R)) y x h

∏ (y : C₂) (h : P y (pr2 (z,, w)))
(h' : (Q₁ · R) (pr1 (z,, w)) y),

h': comp_profunctor_ob Q₁ R z x

  (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P
     (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans τ R) z w
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (comp_profunctor Q₁ R) x

      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (comp_profunctor Q₁ R)

  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ R y (τ y x h') h'') =

∏
(a b c
 d : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f
 g : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ c, d ⟧) (x : f ==> g),
lassociator f h i • ((x ▹ h) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h · i) • lassociator g h i

⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
τ: P₁ ==> P₂
lassociator P₁ Q R • ((τ ▹ Q) ▹ R) =
(τ ▹ Q · R) • lassociator P₂ Q R

(lassociator P₁ Q R • ((τ ▹ Q) ▹ R)) y x h =

rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans τ Q) R z w
  (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₁ Q R z w
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor Q R) x
        h (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q R y h' h''))) =
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₂ Q R z w
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor τ
     (comp_profunctor Q R) z w
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor Q R) x
        h (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q R y h' h'')))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(a b
 c : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f
 g : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h
 i : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧) (x : f ==> g) (y : h ==> i),
(x ▹ h) • (g ◃ y) = (f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
P₁, P₂: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
Q₁, Q₂: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
τ₁: P₁ ==> P₂
τ₂: Q₁ ==> Q₂
(τ₁ ▹ Q₁) • (P₂ ◃ τ₂) = (P₁ ◃ τ₂) • (τ₁ ▹ Q₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
P₁, P₂: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
Q₁, Q₂: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
τ₁: P₁ ==> P₂
τ₂: Q₁ ==> Q₂
∏ (y : C₃) (x : C₁) (h : (P₁ · Q₁) y x),
((τ₁ ▹ Q₁) • (P₂ ◃ τ₂)) y x h =
((P₁ ◃ τ₂) • (τ₁ ▹ Q₂)) y x h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells

⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
Q₁, Q₂: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
τ₁: P₁ ==> P₂
τ₂: Q₁ ==> Q₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: (P₁ · Q₁) z x
((τ₁ ▹ Q₁) • (P₂ ◃ τ₂)) z x h =
((P₁ ◃ τ₂) • (τ₁ ▹ Q₂)) z x h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells

⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
τ₁: P₁ ==> P₂
τ₂: Q₁ ==> Q₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: (P₁ · Q₁) z x
∏ (y : C₂) (h : P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x)))
(h' : Q₁ (pr1 (z,, x)) y),
((τ₁ ▹ Q₁) • (P₂ ◃ τ₂)) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ Q₁ y h h') =
((P₁ ◃ τ₂) • (τ₁ ▹ Q₂)) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ Q₁ y h h')

h': Q₁ z y
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₂ τ₂ z x
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor τ₁ Q₁ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ Q₁ y h h')) =

  (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₁ τ₂ z x

(a b
 c : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells

(f : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells

     ⟦ b, c ⟧),

∏ (y : C₃) (x : C₁) (h : (P · (id_h C₂ · Q)) y x),
(lassociator P (id_h C₂) Q • (runitor P ▹ Q)) y x h =
(P ◃ lunitor Q) y x h

(lassociator P (id_h C₂) Q • (runitor P ▹ Q)) z x h =

x: C₁
h: (P · (id_h C₂ · Q)) z x
∏ (y : C₂) (h : P y (pr2 (z,, x)))
(h' : (id_h C₂ · Q) (pr1 (z,, x)) y),
(lassociator P (id_h C₂) Q • (runitor P ▹ Q)) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_h C₂ · Q) y h h') =
(P ◃ lunitor Q) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_h C₂ · Q) y h h')

  (runitor_profunctor_nat_trans P) Q z x

 rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(a b c d
 e : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells)
(f : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(i : prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
       univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
     ⟦ d, e ⟧),
((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
• (lassociator f g h ▹ i) =
lassociator f g (h · i) • lassociator (f · g) h i
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
P₁: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
P₂: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
P₃: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
P₄: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₄, C₅ ⟧
((P₁ ◃ lassociator P₂ P₃ P₄)
 • lassociator P₁ (P₂ · P₃) P₄)
• (lassociator P₁ P₂ P₃ ▹ P₄) =
lassociator P₁ P₂ (P₃ · P₄)
• lassociator (P₁ · P₂) P₃ P₄

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells

⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
P₃: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells

⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
P₄: prebicat_data_ver_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
⟦ C₄, C₅ ⟧
∏ (y : C₅) (x : C₁) (h : (P₁ · (P₂ · (P₃ · P₄))) y x),
(((P₁ ◃ lassociator P₂ P₃ P₄)
  • lassociator P₁ (P₂ · P₃) P₄)
 • (lassociator P₁ P₂ P₃ ▹ P₄)) y x h =
(lassociator P₁ P₂ (P₃ · P₄)
 • lassociator (P₁ · P₂) P₃ P₄) y x h

z: C₅

(((P₁ ◃ lassociator P₂ P₃ P₄)
  • lassociator P₁ (P₂ · P₃) P₄)
 • (lassociator P₁ P₂ P₃ ▹ P₄)) z v h =
(lassociator P₁ P₂ (P₃ · P₄)
 • lassociator (P₁ · P₂) P₃ P₄) z v h

  (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob P₁

  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k) l) m

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
P₃: profunctor C₃ C₄
P₄: profunctor C₄ C₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
h: P₁ w v
x: C₃
k: P₂ x w
y: C₄
l: P₃ y x
m: P₄ z y
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor
  (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v
  (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob P₁ P₂
     (comp_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v w h
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ (comp_profunctor P₃ P₄)
        x k (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₃ P₄ y l m))) = 
?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
P₃: profunctor C₃ C₄
P₄: profunctor C₄ C₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
h: P₁ w v
x: C₃
k: P₂ x w
y: C₄
l: P₃ y x
m: P₄ z y
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob P₁ P₂
  (comp_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v w h
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ (comp_profunctor P₃ P₄) x
     k (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₃ P₄ y l m)) = ?t2

      exact (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob_comm
               P₁ P₂ (comp_profunctor P₃ P₄)
               h k _).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
P₃: profunctor C₃ C₄
P₄: profunctor C₄ C₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
h: P₁ w v
x: C₃
k: P₂ x w
y: C₄
l: P₃ y x
m: P₄ z y
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor
  (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂)
     (comp_profunctor P₃ P₄) x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k)
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₃ P₄ y l m)) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in
  (comp_profunctor (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ y
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k) l) m

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
P₃: profunctor C₃ C₄
P₄: profunctor C₄ C₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
h: P₁ w v
x: C₃
k: P₂ x w
y: C₄
l: P₃ y x
m: P₄ z y
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob
  (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₃ P₄ y l m) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in
  (comp_profunctor (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ y
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k) l) m

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
P₃: profunctor C₃ C₄
P₄: profunctor C₄ C₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
h: P₁ w v
x: C₃
k: P₂ x w
y: C₄
l: P₃ y x
m: P₄ z y
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob
  (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₃ P₄ y l m) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
P₃: profunctor C₃ C₄
P₄: profunctor C₄ C₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
h: P₁ w v
x: C₃
k: P₂ x w
y: C₄
l: P₃ y x
m: P₄ z y
?b =
comp_profunctor_ob_in
  (comp_profunctor (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ y
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k) l) m

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
P₃: profunctor C₃ C₄
P₄: profunctor C₄ C₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
h: P₁ w v
x: C₃
k: P₂ x w
y: C₄
l: P₃ y x
m: P₄ z y
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob
  (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₃ P₄ y l m) = ?b

      exact (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob_comm
               (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄
               _ l m).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
P₃: profunctor C₃ C₄
P₄: profunctor C₄ C₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
h: P₁ w v
x: C₃
k: P₂ x w
y: C₄
l: P₃ y x
m: P₄ z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in
  (comp_profunctor (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ y
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k) l) m =
comp_profunctor_ob_in
  (comp_profunctor (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ y
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ w h k) l) m

    apply idpath.
Qed.


ver_bicat_sq_bicat


ver_bicat_sq_bicat

  
ver_sq_bicat
ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp ?B
ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells ?I
ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws ?J
isaset_cells (prebicat_ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws ?H)

  
ver_sq_bicat
 exact univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat.
  
ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat
 exact univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp.
  
ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
 exact univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells.
  
ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws
  univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
 exact univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws.
  
isaset_cells
  (prebicat_ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws
     univcat_profunctor_ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws)
 abstract
      (intros C₁ C₂ P Q ;
       apply isaset_profunctor_nat_trans).
Defined.


ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp_sq
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat


ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp_sq
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat

  
twosided_disp_cat_id
  (ver_bicat_sq_bicat_to_ver_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
     univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat)
twosided_disp_cat_comp
  (ver_bicat_sq_bicat_to_ver_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
     univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat)

  
twosided_disp_cat_id
  (ver_bicat_sq_bicat_to_ver_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
     univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat)
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ : univalent_category)
             (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂),
           id_v_profunctor_square F).
  
twosided_disp_cat_comp
  (ver_bicat_sq_bicat_to_ver_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
     univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat)
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ D₁ D₂ D₃ : univalent_category)
             (F₁ : C₁ ⟶ D₁)
             (F₂ : C₂ ⟶ D₂)
             (F₃ : C₃ ⟶ D₃)
             (P₁ : C₁ ↛ C₂)
             (P₂ : C₂ ↛ C₃)
             (Q₁ : D₁ ↛ D₂)
             (Q₂ : D₂ ↛ D₃)
             (τ : profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁)
             (θ : profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂ Q₂),
           comp_v_profunctor_square τ θ).
Defined.

 exact univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp_sq.
Defined.

(** * 3. The whiskering operations *)

double_bicat_whiskering
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp


double_bicat_whiskering
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp

  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁
 v₁' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
       ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ x, z ⟧),
v₁ ==> v₁'
→ square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁' v₂
  → square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂
 v₂' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
       ⟦ x, z ⟧),
v₂ ==> v₂'
→ square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
  → square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂'
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(h₁
 h₁' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
       ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ x, z ⟧),
h₁ ==> h₁'
→ square_double_bicat h₁' h₂ v₁ v₂
  → square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂
 h₂' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
       ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ x, z ⟧),
h₂ ==> h₂'
→ square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
  → square_double_bicat h₁ h₂' v₁ v₂

  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁
 v₁' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
       ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ x, z ⟧),
v₁ ==> v₁'
→ square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁' v₂
  → square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : univalent_category)
             (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
             (G : C₃ ⟶ C₄)
             (P₁ P₂ : C₁ ↛ C₃)
             (Q : C₂ ↛ C₄)
             (τ : profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂)
             (s : profunctor_square G F P₂ Q),
           lwhisker_profunctor_square τ s).
  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂
 v₂' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
       ⟦ x, z ⟧),
v₂ ==> v₂'
→ square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
  → square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂'
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : univalent_category)
             (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
             (G : C₃ ⟶ C₄)
             (P : C₁ ↛ C₃)
             (Q₁ Q₂ : C₂ ↛ C₄)
             (τ : profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂)
             (s : profunctor_square G F P Q₁),
           rwhisker_profunctor_square τ s).
  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(h₁
 h₁' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
       ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ x, z ⟧),
h₁ ==> h₁'
→ square_double_bicat h₁' h₂ v₁ v₂
  → square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : univalent_category)
             (F₁ F₂ : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
             (G : C₃ ⟶ C₄)
             (P : C₁ ↛ C₃)
             (Q : C₂ ↛ C₄)
             (τ : F₂ ⟹ F₁)
             (s : profunctor_square G F₂ P Q),
           uwhisker_profunctor_square τ s).
  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂
 h₂' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
       ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
      ⟦ x, z ⟧),
h₂ ==> h₂'
→ square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂
  → square_double_bicat h₁ h₂' v₁ v₂
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : univalent_category)
             (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
             (G₁ G₂ : C₃ ⟶ C₄)
             (P : C₁ ↛ C₃)
             (Q : C₂ ↛ C₄)
             (τ : G₂ ⟹ G₁)
             (s : profunctor_square G₁ F P Q),
           dwhisker_profunctor_square τ s).
Defined.


ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker


ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

  
ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
double_bicat_whiskering ?B

  
ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
 exact univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp.
  
double_bicat_whiskering
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
 exact univcat_profunctor_double_bicat_whiskering.
Defined.

(** * 4. More laws *)

whisker_square_bicat_law
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker


whisker_square_bicat_law
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂),
id₂ v₁ ◃s s = s
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ v₁'
 v₁'' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
          univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
        ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (τ₁ : v₁ ==> v₁') (τ₂ : v₁' ==> v₁'')
(s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁'' v₂),
(τ₁ • τ₂) ◃s s = τ₁ ◃s (τ₂ ◃s s)
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂),
id₂ v₂ ▹s s = s
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
lwhisker_profunctor_square (profunctor_nat_trans_id P)
  τ = τ

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: P z x
τ z x h = τ z x h

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ v₁'
 v₁'' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
          univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
        ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (τ₁ : v₁ ==> v₁') (τ₂ : v₁' ==> v₁'')
(s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁'' v₂),
(τ₁ • τ₂) ◃s s = τ₁ ◃s (τ₂ ◃s s)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P₁, P₂, P₃: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₂ P₃
θ: profunctor_square G F P₃ Q
lwhisker_profunctor_square
  (profunctor_nat_trans_comp τ₁ τ₂) θ =
lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁
  (lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P₁, P₂, P₃: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₂ P₃
θ: profunctor_square G F P₃ Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: P₁ z x
θ z x (τ₂ (z,, x) (τ₁ (z,, x) h)) =
θ z x (τ₂ z x (τ₁ z x h))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat

      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂),
id₂ v₂ ▹s s = s

G: C₃ ⟶ C₄

Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
rwhisker_profunctor_square (profunctor_nat_trans_id Q)
  τ = τ

G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃

τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₂ Q₃

rwhisker_profunctor_square
  (profunctor_nat_trans_comp τ₁ τ₂) θ =

  (rwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ θ)

τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₂ Q₃
θ: profunctor_square G F P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: P z x
τ₂ (G z,, F x) (τ₁ (G z,, F x) (θ z x h)) =
τ₂ (G z) (F x) (τ₁ (G z) (F x) (θ z x h))

    apply idpath.

G: C₃ ⟶ C₄

Q: profunctor C₂ C₄

τ₂: F₃ ⟹ F₂
θ: profunctor_square G F₃ P Q
uwhisker_profunctor_square
  (nat_trans_comp F₃ F₂ F₁ τ₂ τ₁) θ =

τ₂: F₃ ⟹ F₂
θ: profunctor_square G F₃ P Q
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: P z x
rmap Q (τ₂ x · τ₁ x) (θ z x h) =
rmap Q (τ₁ x) (rmap Q (τ₂ x) (θ z x h))

rmap Q (τ₁ x) (rmap Q (τ₂ x) (θ z x h))

    apply idpath.

Q: profunctor C₂ C₄

τ₂: G₃ ⟹ G₂
θ: profunctor_square G₁ F P Q
dwhisker_profunctor_square

lmap Q (τ₂ z) (lmap Q (τ₁ z) (θ z x h))

x: C₁

      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂
 h₂' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂
 v₂' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x, z ⟧) (τ : h₂ ==> h₂') (θ : v₂ ==> v₂')
(s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂),
θ ▹s (τ ▿s s) = τ ▿s (θ ▹s s)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ₁: G₂ ⟹ G₁
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ: profunctor_square G₁ F P Q₁
rwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ θ) =
dwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁
  (rwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ₁: G₂ ⟹ G₁
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ: profunctor_square G₁ F P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: P z x
τ₂ (G₂ z) (F x) (lmap Q₁ (τ₁ z) (θ z x h)) =
lmap Q₂ (τ₁ z) (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F x) (θ z x h))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ₁: G₂ ⟹ G₁
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ: profunctor_square G₁ F P Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: P z x
lmap Q₂ (τ₁ z) (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F x) (θ z x h)) =
lmap Q₂ (τ₁ z) (τ₂ (G₁ z) (F x) (θ z x h))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁
 v₁' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂
 v₂' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x, z ⟧) (τ : v₁ ==> v₁') (θ : v₂ ==> v₂')
(s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁' v₂),
θ ▹s (τ ◃s s) = τ ◃s (θ ▹s s)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ: profunctor_square G F P₂ Q₁
rwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂
  (lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ θ) =
lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁
  (rwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ θ)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ: profunctor_square G F P₂ Q₁
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: P₁ z x
τ₂ (G z) (F x) (θ z x (τ₁ z x h)) =
τ₂ (G z) (F x) (θ z x (τ₁ z x h))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x
 y : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(v
 w : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
       univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ x, y ⟧) (τ : v ==> w),
τ ◃s id_h_square_bicat w = τ ▹s id_h_square_bicat v
 
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
τ: profunctor_nat_trans P Q
lwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (id_h_profunctor_square Q) =
rwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (id_h_profunctor_square P)

    
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
τ: profunctor_nat_trans P Q
z: C₂
x: C₁
h: P z x
τ z x h = τ z x h

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x
 y : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h
 k : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ x, y ⟧) (τ : h ==> k),
τ ▵s id_v_square_bicat k = τ ▿s id_v_square_bicat h
 
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: Q ⟹ P
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (id_v_profunctor_square Q) =
dwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (id_v_profunctor_square P)

    
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: Q ⟹ P
z, x: C₁
h: id_profunctor C₁ z x
id_h (Q z) · # Q h · τ x = τ z · # P h · id_h (P x)

    
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: Q ⟹ P
z, x: C₁
h: id_profunctor C₁ z x
# Q h · τ x = τ z · # P h

    
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: Q ⟹ P
z, x: C₁
h: id_profunctor C₁ z x
τ z · # P h = τ z · # P h

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁
 z₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁
 h₁' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(h₃ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧)
(w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) (τ : h₁ ==> h₁')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁' h₂ v₁ w₁)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂),
τ ▵s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = (τ ▵s s₁) ⋆v s₂
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_v_profunctor_square
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
h: comp_profunctor P₁ P₂ z x
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) z x h =
comp_v_profunctor_square
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
∏ (y : C₃) (h : P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x)))
(h' : P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y),
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_v_profunctor_square
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ (id_h (H z)) (τ x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ (id_h (H z)) (τ x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
?b =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ (id_h (H z)) (τ x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?t2

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm θ₁ θ₂ z x y h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ (id_h (H z)) (τ x)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
     (θ₂ z y h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (rmap Q₁ (τ x) (θ₁ y x h))
  (lmap Q₂ (id_h (H z)) (θ₂ z y h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (rmap Q₁ (τ x) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h') =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (rmap Q₁ (τ x) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
?b =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (rmap Q₁ (τ x) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
               (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂
               z x y
               h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁ y x h) (θ₂ z y h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (rmap Q₁ (τ x) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: F₂ ⟹ F₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F₂ P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (rmap Q₁ (τ x) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (rmap Q₁ (τ x) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h')

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁
 z₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(h₃
 h₃' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧)
(w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) (τ : h₃ ==> h₃')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂),
τ ▿s s₁ ⋆v s₂ = s₁ ⋆v (τ ▿s s₂)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
dwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
h: comp_profunctor P₁ P₂ z x
dwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) z x h =
comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
h: comp_profunctor P₁ P₂ z x
∏ (y : C₃) (h : P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x)))
(h' : P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y),
dwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅

Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
∏ (y : C₃) (h : P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x)))
(h' : P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y),
dwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ (τ z) (id_h (F x))
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂

y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ (τ z) (id_h (F x))
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆

z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
?b =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ (τ z) (id_h (F x))
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) = ?b

G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅

Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?t2

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm θ₁ θ₂ z x y h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_mor Q₁ Q₂ (τ z) (id_h (F x))
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
     (θ₂ z y h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y)
  (rmap Q₁ (id_h (F x)) (θ₁ y x h))
  (lmap Q₂ (τ z) (θ₂ z y h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (lmap Q₂ (τ z) (θ₂ z y h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁

θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (lmap Q₂ (τ z) (θ₂ z y h'))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄

θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂

x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: H₂ ⟹ H₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
?b =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (lmap Q₂ (τ z) (θ₂ z y h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄

θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
               θ₁ (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂)
               z x y
               h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄

θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂ z y h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (lmap Q₂ (τ z) (θ₂ z y h'))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H₁, H₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅

θ₁: profunctor_square G F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G P₂ Q₂

x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x))
h': P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (lmap Q₂ (τ z) (θ₂ z y h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (lmap Q₂ (τ z) (θ₂ z y h'))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁
 z₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂
 h₂' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(h₃ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧)
(w₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(w₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) (τ : h₂ ==> h₂')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂' h₃ v₂ w₂),
s₁ ⋆v (τ ▵s s₂) = (τ ▿s s₁) ⋆v s₂
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
comp_v_profunctor_square θ₁
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) =
comp_v_profunctor_square
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
h: comp_profunctor P₁ P₂ z x
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x h =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
h: comp_profunctor P₁ P₂ z x
∏ (y : C₃) (h : P₁ y x) (h' : P₂ z y),
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

H: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅

Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆

θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
∏ (y : C₃) (h : P₁ y x) (h' : P₂ z y),
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

H: C₅ ⟶ C₆

Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆

θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

H: C₅ ⟶ C₆

Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
?b =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
               θ₁ (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂)
               z x y
               h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₁ y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂ z y h') =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₁ y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂ z y h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆

θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
?b =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₁ y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂ z y h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
               (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂
               z x y h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₂ y)
  (dwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁ y x h) (θ₂ z y h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₁ y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂ z y h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₂ y)
  (lmap Q₁ (τ y) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₁ y) (θ₁ y x h)
  (rmap Q₂ (τ y) (θ₂ z y h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
H: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
τ: G₂ ⟹ G₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F P₁ Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H G₂ P₂ Q₂
z: C₅
x: C₁
y: C₃
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₂ y)
  (lmap Q₁ (τ y) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₂ y)
  (lmap Q₁ (τ y) (θ₁ y x h)) (θ₂ z y h')

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂
 y₃ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(k₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(k₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₁
 v₁' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧) (τ : v₁ ==> v₁')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁' v₂)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃),
τ ◃s s₁ ⋆h s₂ = (τ ◃s s₁) ⋆h s₂
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₄ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q: profunctor C₂ C₅
R: profunctor C₃ C₆
τ: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P₂ Q
θ₂: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ Q R
lwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_h_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_h_profunctor_square
  (lwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₄ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q: profunctor C₂ C₅
R: profunctor C₃ C₆
τ: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P₂ Q
θ₂: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ Q R
z: C₄
x: C₁
h: P₁ z x
θ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (θ₁ z x (τ z x h)) =
θ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (θ₁ z x (τ z x h))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂
 y₃ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(k₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(k₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃
 v₃' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧) (τ : v₃ ==> v₃')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃),
τ ▹s s₁ ⋆h s₂ = s₁ ⋆h (τ ▹s s₂)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₄ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂, R: profunctor C₃ C₆
τ: profunctor_nat_trans Q₂ R
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ Q₁ Q₂
rwhisker_profunctor_square τ
  (comp_h_profunctor_square θ₁ θ₂) =
comp_h_profunctor_square θ₁
  (rwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₄ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂, R: profunctor C₃ C₆
τ: profunctor_nat_trans Q₂ R
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P Q₁
θ₂: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ Q₁ Q₂
z: C₄
x: C₁
h: P z x
τ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
  (θ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (θ₁ z x h)) =
τ (G₂ (G₁ z)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
  (θ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (θ₁ z x h))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂
 y₃ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(k₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(k₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂
 v₂' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧) (τ : v₂ ==> v₂')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂' v₃),
s₁ ⋆h (τ ◃s s₂) = (τ ▹s s₁) ⋆h s₂
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₄ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q, R₁: profunctor C₂ C₅
R₂: profunctor C₃ C₆
τ: profunctor_nat_trans Q R₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P Q
θ₂: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ R₁ R₂
comp_h_profunctor_square θ₁
  (lwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₂) =
comp_h_profunctor_square
  (rwhisker_profunctor_square τ θ₁) θ₂

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
G₁: C₄ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q, R₁: profunctor C₂ C₅
R₂: profunctor C₃ C₆
τ: profunctor_nat_trans Q R₁
θ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P Q
θ₂: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ R₁ R₂
z: C₄
x: C₁
h: P z x
θ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (τ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (θ₁ z x h)) =
θ₂ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (τ (G₁ z) (F₁ x) (θ₁ z x h))

    apply idpath.
Qed.


double_bicat_id_comp_square_laws
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker


double_bicat_id_comp_square_laws
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

  
double_bicat_interchange_law
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
∏ x : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker,
id_h_square_bicat (id_h x) =
id_v_square_bicat (id_h x)
∏
(x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
       univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(k : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
       univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ y, z ⟧),
id_h_square_bicat h ⋆v id_h_square_bicat k =
id_h_square_bicat (h · k)
∏
(x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(v : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(w : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ y, z ⟧),
id_v_square_bicat v ⋆h id_v_square_bicat w =
id_v_square_bicat (v · w)

  
double_bicat_interchange_law
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

θ₂: square_double_bicat G₂ H₂ Q₂ R₂
(τ₁ ⋆v τ₂) ⋆h (θ₁ ⋆v θ₂) = τ₁ ⋆h θ₁ ⋆v τ₂ ⋆h θ₂

h: (P₁ · P₂) z x
((τ₁ ⋆v τ₂) ⋆h (θ₁ ⋆v θ₂)) z x h =
(τ₁ ⋆h θ₁ ⋆v τ₂ ⋆h θ₂) z x h

τ₁: square_double_bicat F₁ G₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: square_double_bicat G₁ H₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: square_double_bicat F₂ G₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: square_double_bicat G₂ H₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: (P₁ · P₂) z x
∏ (y : C₂) (h : P₁ y (pr2 (z,, x)))
(h' : P₂ (pr1 (z,, x)) y),
((τ₁ ⋆v τ₂) ⋆h (θ₁ ⋆v θ₂)) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
(τ₁ ⋆h θ₁ ⋆v τ₂ ⋆h θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₀: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
Q₁: profunctor C₄ C₅
Q₂: profunctor C₅ C₆
R₁: profunctor C₇ C₈
R₂: profunctor C₈ C₀
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₀
τ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₂ G₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ (y : C₂) (h : P₁ y x) (h' : P₂ z y),
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z) (F₁ x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

R₂: profunctor C₈ C₀

F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇

G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈

H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₀
τ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G₁ P₂ Q₂

θ₂: profunctor_square H₂ G₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z) (F₁ x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

θ₂: profunctor_square H₂ G₂ Q₂ R₂

x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z) (F₁ x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')) = ?b

H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₀

h': P₂ z y
?b =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x

P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂

Q₁: profunctor C₄ C₅

x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁ τ₂ z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?t2

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm τ₁ τ₂ z x y h h').

  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₁ y) (τ₁ y x h)
     (τ₂ z y h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₁ y) (τ₁ y x h)
     (τ₂ z y h')) = ?b

P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂

h: P₁ y x

?b =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₀: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
Q₁: profunctor C₄ C₅
Q₂: profunctor C₅ C₆
R₁: profunctor C₇ C₈
R₂: profunctor C₈ C₀
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₀
τ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₂ G₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor θ₁ θ₂ (H₁ z) (F₁ x)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (G₁ y) (τ₁ y x h)
     (τ₂ z y h')) = ?b

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
               θ₁ θ₂
               (H₁ z) (F₁ x) (G₁ y)
               (τ₁ y x h) (τ₂ z y h')).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₀: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃

h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in R₁ R₂ (G₂ (G₁ y))
  (θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h))
  (θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y) (τ₂ z y h')) =
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₀: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
Q₁: profunctor C₄ C₅
Q₂: profunctor C₅ C₆
R₁: profunctor C₇ C₈
R₂: profunctor C₈ C₀
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₄
F₂: C₄ ⟶ C₇
G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₀
τ₁: profunctor_square G₁ F₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₂ G₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in R₁ R₂ (G₂ (G₁ y))
  (θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h))
  (θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y) (τ₂ z y h'))

h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x

?b =
comp_profunctor_ob_in R₁ R₂ (G₂ (G₁ y))
  (θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₀: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
Q₁: profunctor C₄ C₅
Q₂: profunctor C₅ C₆
R₁: profunctor C₇ C₈
R₂: profunctor C₈ C₀

G₁: C₂ ⟶ C₅
G₂: C₅ ⟶ C₈
H₁: C₃ ⟶ C₆
H₂: C₆ ⟶ C₀

τ₂: profunctor_square H₁ G₁ P₂ Q₂
θ₁: profunctor_square G₂ F₂ Q₁ R₁
θ₂: profunctor_square H₂ G₂ Q₂ R₂
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ y h h') = ?b

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
               (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁) (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂)
               z x y
               h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈, C₀: univalent_category
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₂
P₂: profunctor C₂ C₃
Q₁: profunctor C₄ C₅
Q₂: profunctor C₅ C₆

R₂: profunctor C₈ C₀

x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in R₁ R₂ ((G₁ ∙ G₂) y)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₁ θ₁ y x h)
  (comp_h_profunctor_square τ₂ θ₂ z y h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in R₁ R₂ (G₂ (G₁ y))
  (θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h))
  (θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y) (τ₂ z y h'))

x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P₁ y x
h': P₂ z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in R₁ R₂ (G₂ (G₁ y))
  (θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h))
  (θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y) (τ₂ z y h')) =
