  (θ₁ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h))
  (θ₂ (H₁ z) (G₁ y) (τ₂ z y h'))

    apply idpath.
  
∏ x : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker,
id_h_square_bicat (id_h x) =
id_v_square_bicat (id_h x)
 
C: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
id_h_square_bicat (id_h C) =
id_v_square_bicat (id_h C)

    
C: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
y, x: C
h: id_h C y x
h = h

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
       univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(k : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
       univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ y, z ⟧),
id_h_square_bicat h ⋆v id_h_square_bicat k =
id_h_square_bicat (h · k)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
P: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
id_h_square_bicat P ⋆v id_h_square_bicat Q =
id_h_square_bicat (P · Q)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
P: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: (P · Q) z x
(id_h_square_bicat P ⋆v id_h_square_bicat Q) z x h =
id_h_square_bicat (P · Q) z x h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
P: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
z: C₃
x: C₁
h: (P · Q) z x
∏ (y : C₂) (h : P y (pr2 (z,, x)))
(h' : Q (pr1 (z,, x)) y),
(id_h_square_bicat P ⋆v id_h_square_bicat Q) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h') =
id_h_square_bicat (P · Q) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h')

⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ (y : C₂) (h : P y (pr2 (z,, x)))
(h' : Q (pr1 (z,, x)) y),
(id_h_square_bicat P ⋆v id_h_square_bicat Q) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h') =
id_h_square_bicat (P · Q) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h')

P: profunctor C₁ C₂
Q: profunctor C₂ C₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P y x
h': Q z y
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (id_h_profunctor_square P)
  (id_h_profunctor_square Q) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h'

  (id_h_profunctor_square P)
  (id_h_profunctor_square Q) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h') = ?b

Q: profunctor C₂ C₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂

h': Q z y
?b = comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h'

Q: profunctor C₂ C₃

  (id_h_profunctor_square P)
  (id_h_profunctor_square Q) z x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h') = ?b

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
               (id_h_profunctor_square P) (id_h_profunctor_square Q)
               z x y
               h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
P: profunctor C₁ C₂
Q: profunctor C₂ C₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P y x
h': Q z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q (functor_identity C₂ y)
  (id_h_profunctor_square P y x h)
  (id_h_profunctor_square Q z y h') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h'

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
P: profunctor C₁ C₂
Q: profunctor C₂ C₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
h: P y x
h': Q z y
comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h' =
comp_profunctor_ob_in P Q y h h'

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(v : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(w : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
     ⟦ y, z ⟧),
id_v_square_bicat v ⋆h id_v_square_bicat w =
id_v_square_bicat (v · w)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
P: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
Q: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
id_v_square_bicat P ⋆h id_v_square_bicat Q =
id_v_square_bicat (P · Q)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
P: C₁ ⟶ C₂
Q: C₂ ⟶ C₃
z, x: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
# Q (# P h) = # Q (# P h)

    apply idpath.
Qed.

 y₄ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)

(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃)
(s₃ : square_double_bicat h₃ k₃ v₃ v₄),
is_hor_cylinder (s₁ ⋆h (s₂ ⋆h s₃)) (s₁ ⋆h s₂ ⋆h s₃)
  (lassociator h₁ h₂ h₃) (lassociator k₁ k₂ k₃)

(w₁ w₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁
 z₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)

(u₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat

        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧)
(s₁ : square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂)
(s₃ : square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃),
is_ver_cylinder (s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃)) (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
  (lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃) (lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)

(w x y

      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂),
is_hor_cylinder (s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂) s
  (runitor h₁) (runitor h₂)

 z₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)

       ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(w₂
 w₂' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) (τ₁ : v₁ ==> v₁') (τ₂ : v₂ ==> v₂')
(θ₁ : w₁ ==> w₁') (θ₂ : w₂ ==> w₂')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁)
(s₁' : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁' w₁')
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂)
(s₂' : square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂' w₂'),
is_ver_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
→ is_ver_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
  → is_ver_cylinder (s₁ ⋆v s₂) (s₁' ⋆v s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁)
      (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂
 y₃ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁
 h₁' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂
 h₂' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

 k₁' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

(k₂
 k₂' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

      ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧) (τ₁ : h₁ ==> h₁') (τ₂ : h₂ ==> h₂')
(θ₁ : k₁ ==> k₁') (θ₂ : k₂ ==> k₂')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂)
(s₁' : square_double_bicat h₁' k₁' v₁ v₂)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃)
(s₂' : square_double_bicat h₂' k₂' v₂ v₃),
is_hor_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
→ is_hor_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
  → is_hor_cylinder (s₁ ⋆h s₂) (s₁' ⋆h s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁)
      (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)

∏ (y : D₁) (x : C₁) (h : P₁ y x),
(lassociator G₁ G₂ G₃ ▿s τ₁ ⋆h (τ₂ ⋆h τ₃)) y x h =
(lassociator F₁ F₂ F₃ ▵s τ₁ ⋆h τ₂ ⋆h τ₃) y x h

τ₁: square_double_bicat F₁ G₁ P₁ P₂
τ₂: square_double_bicat F₂ G₂ P₂ P₃
τ₃: square_double_bicat F₃ G₃ P₃ P₄
y: D₁
x: C₁
h: P₁ y x
lmap P₄ (id_h (G₃ (G₂ (G₁ y))))
  (τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ y)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
     (τ₂ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h))) =
rmap P₄ (id_h (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
  (τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ y)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
     (τ₂ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h)))

τ₃: square_double_bicat F₃ G₃ P₃ P₄
y: D₁
x: C₁
h: P₁ y x
τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ y)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
  (τ₂ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h)) =
τ₃ (G₂ (G₁ y)) (F₂ (F₁ x))
  (τ₂ (G₁ y) (F₁ x) (τ₁ y x h))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(w₁ w₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁
 z₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(hw : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧)
(hx : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(hy : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(hz : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(u₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧)
(u₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(u₃ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧)
(s₁ : square_double_bicat hw hx u₁ v₁)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat hx hy u₂ v₂)
(s₃ : square_double_bicat hy hz u₃ v₃),
is_ver_cylinder (s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃)) (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
  (lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃) (lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)

τ₃: square_double_bicat F₃ F₄ P₃ Q₃
∏ (y : C₇) (x : C₁) (h : (P₁ · (P₂ · P₃)) y x),
(lassociator P₁ P₂ P₃ ◃s τ₁ ⋆v τ₂ ⋆v τ₃) y x h =
(lassociator Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ ▹s τ₁ ⋆v (τ₂ ⋆v τ₃)) y x h

x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
h: (P₁ · (P₂ · P₃)) x₁ x₂
∏ (y : C₃) (h : P₁ y (pr2 (x₁,, x₂)))
(h' : (P₂ · P₃) (pr1 (x₁,, x₂)) y),
(lassociator P₁ P₂ P₃ ◃s τ₁ ⋆v τ₂ ⋆v τ₃) x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (P₂ · P₃) y h h') =
(lassociator Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ ▹s τ₁ ⋆v (τ₂ ⋆v τ₃)) x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (P₂ · P₃) y h h')

(h' : (P₂ · P₃) (pr1 (x₁,, x₂)) y),
(lassociator P₁ P₂ P₃ ◃s τ₁ ⋆v τ₂ ⋆v τ₃) x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (P₂ · P₃) y h h') =

x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ (pr2 (x₁,, x₂))
h': (P₂ · P₃) (pr1 (x₁,, x₂)) x₃
(lassociator P₁ P₂ P₃ ◃s τ₁ ⋆v τ₂ ⋆v τ₃) x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (P₂ · P₃) x₃ h h') =
(lassociator Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ ▹s τ₁ ⋆v (τ₂ ⋆v τ₃)) x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (P₂ · P₃) x₃ h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
P₃: profunctor C₅ C₇
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
Q₃: profunctor C₆ C₈
τ₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: profunctor_square F₄ F₃ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': comp_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂
  (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₂
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃)
        x₃ h h')) =
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
     (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃)
        x₃ h h'))

F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈

P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅

x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': comp_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃
∏ (y : C₅) (h0 : P₂ y x₃) (h' : P₃ x₁ y),
(λ h'0 : comp_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃,
 comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
   (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂
   (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₂
      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁
         (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃) x₃ h h'0)))
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ y h0 h') =
(λ h'0 : comp_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃,
 associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
   (F₁ x₂)
   (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
      (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁
         (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃) x₃ h h'0)))
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ y h0 h')

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
∏ (y : C₅) (h0 : P₂ y x₃) (h' : P₃ x₁ y),
(λ h'0 : comp_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃,
 comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
   (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂
   (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₂
      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁
         (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃) x₃ h h'0)))
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ y h0 h') =
(λ h'0 : comp_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ x₁ x₃,
 associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
   (F₁ x₂)
   (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
      (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
      (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁
         (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃) x₃ h h'0)))
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ y h0 h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂

τ₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: profunctor_square F₄ F₃ P₃ Q₃

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂
  (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₂
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃)
        x₃ h (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h''))) =
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
     (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃)
        x₃ h (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'')))

h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂
  (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
     x₂ x₃ h (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'')) =
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)

  (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁
     x₂ x₃ h (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'')) =

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂

x₃: C₃

x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
?b =

  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
     (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃)
        x₃ h (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'')))

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂

F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈

Q₃: profunctor C₆ C₈

τ₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: profunctor_square F₄ F₃ P₃ Q₃

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob P₁ P₂ P₃ x₁ x₂
  x₃ h (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'') = ?t2

      apply associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob_comm.

x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₁ τ₂) τ₃ x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ x₄
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₂ x₃ h h') h'') =
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
     (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃)
        x₃ h (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'')))

τ₃: profunctor_square F₄ F₃ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₁
  (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ (comp_profunctor P₂ P₃) x₃
     h (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'')) = 
?t2

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm τ₁ (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃) _ _ _ _ _).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
P₃: profunctor C₅ C₇
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
Q₃: profunctor C₆ C₈
τ₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: profunctor_square F₄ F₃ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₁ Q₂ Q₃ (F₄ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ (comp_profunctor Q₂ Q₃)
     (F₂ x₃) (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (comp_v_profunctor_square τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h''))) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
  (F₃ x₄)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₂ x₃) (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (τ₂ x₄ x₃ h')) (τ₃ x₁ x₄ h'')

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂

h'': P₃ x₁ x₄

  (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃) (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ₂ τ₃ x₁ x₃
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
  (F₃ x₄)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₂ x₃) (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (τ₂ x₄ x₃ h')) (τ₃ x₁ x₄ h'')

     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₃ x₄ h' h'')) = ?b

?b =

  (F₃ x₄)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
P₃: profunctor C₅ C₇
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
Q₃: profunctor C₆ C₈

τ₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: profunctor_square F₄ F₃ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
  (F₄ x₁) (F₁ x₂) (F₂ x₃) (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₃ (F₃ x₄) (τ₂ x₄ x₃ h')
     (τ₃ x₁ x₄ h'')) = ?b

      exact (associator_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_ob_comm
               Q₁ Q₂ Q₃
               (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
               (τ₂ x₄ x₃ h')
               (τ₃ x₁ x₄ h'')).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
P₃: profunctor C₅ C₇
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
Q₃: profunctor C₆ C₈

τ₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: profunctor_square F₄ F₃ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
  (F₃ (pr1 (x₄,, x₃)))
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₂ (pr1 (x₃,, x₂)))
     (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h) (τ₂ x₄ x₃ h')) (τ₃ x₁ x₄ h'') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
  (F₃ x₄)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₂ x₃) (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (τ₂ x₄ x₃ h')) (τ₃ x₁ x₄ h'')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆, C₇, C₈: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
F₄: C₇ ⟶ C₈
P₁: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₂: profunctor C₃ C₅
P₃: profunctor C₅ C₇
Q₁: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₂: profunctor C₄ C₆
Q₃: profunctor C₆ C₈
τ₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
τ₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂ Q₂
τ₃: profunctor_square F₄ F₃ P₃ Q₃
x₁: C₇
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
x₄: C₅
h': P₂ x₄ x₃
h'': P₃ x₁ x₄
comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
  (F₃ x₄)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₂ x₃) (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (τ₂ x₄ x₃ h')) (τ₃ x₁ x₄ h'') =
comp_profunctor_ob_in (comp_profunctor Q₁ Q₂) Q₃
  (F₃ x₄)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₂ (F₂ x₃) (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (τ₂ x₄ x₃ h')) (τ₃ x₁ x₄ h'')

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂),
is_hor_cylinder (id_h_square_bicat v₁ ⋆h s) s
  (lunitor h₁) (lunitor h₂)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
F: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
P: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₃ ⟧
Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₄ ⟧
τ: square_double_bicat F G P Q
is_hor_cylinder (id_h_square_bicat P ⋆h τ) τ
  (lunitor F) (lunitor G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
F: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
P: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₃ ⟧
Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₄ ⟧
τ: square_double_bicat F G P Q
∏ (y : C₃) (x : C₁) (h : P y x),
(lunitor G ▿s id_h_square_bicat P ⋆h τ) y x h =
(lunitor F ▵s τ) y x h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
F: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
P: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₃ ⟧
Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₄ ⟧
τ: square_double_bicat F G P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
h: P y x
lmap Q (id_h (G y)) (τ y x h) =
rmap Q (id_h (F x)) (τ y x h)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
F: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
P: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₃ ⟧
Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₄ ⟧
τ: square_double_bicat F G P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
h: P y x
τ y x h = τ y x h

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂),
is_ver_cylinder (id_v_square_bicat h₁ ⋆v s) s
  (lunitor v₁) (lunitor v₂)

τ: square_double_bicat F G P Q
∏ (y : C₃) (x : C₁) (h : (id_h C₁ · P) y x),
(lunitor P ◃s τ) y x h =
(lunitor Q ▹s id_v_square_bicat F ⋆v τ) y x h

τ: square_double_bicat F G P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
h: (id_h C₁ · P) y x
(lunitor P ◃s τ) y x h =
(lunitor Q ▹s id_v_square_bicat F ⋆v τ) y x h

⟦ C₂, C₄ ⟧
τ: square_double_bicat F G P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
h: (id_h C₁ · P) y x
∏ (y0 : C₁) (h : id_h C₁ y0 (pr2 (y,, x)))
(h' : P (pr1 (y,, x)) y0),
(lunitor P ◃s τ) y x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_h C₁) P y0 h h') =
(lunitor Q ▹s id_v_square_bicat F ⋆v τ) y x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_h C₁) P y0 h h')

y: C₃
x: C₁
∏ (y0 : C₁) (h : id_h C₁ y0 (pr2 (y,, x)))
(h' : P (pr1 (y,, x)) y0),
(lunitor P ◃s τ) y x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_h C₁) P y0 h h') =
(lunitor Q ▹s id_v_square_bicat F ⋆v τ) y x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_h C₁) P y0 h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
τ y x
  (lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₁) P z h
        h')) =
lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
     (id_v_profunctor_square F) τ y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₁) P z h
        h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
τ y x (rmap P h h') =
lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
     (id_v_profunctor_square F) τ y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₁) P z h
        h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
     (id_v_profunctor_square F) τ y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₁) P z h
        h')) = τ y x (rmap P h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
     (id_v_profunctor_square F) τ y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₁) P z h
        h')) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
?b = τ y x (rmap P h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
     (id_v_profunctor_square F) τ y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₁) P z h
        h')) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor
  (id_v_profunctor_square F) τ y x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₁) P z h h') =
?t2

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm (id_v_profunctor_square F) τ y x z h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₂) Q (F z)
     (id_v_profunctor_square F z x h) (τ y z h')) =
τ y x (rmap P h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in (id_profunctor C₂) Q (F z)
     (# F h) (τ y z h')) = τ y x (rmap P h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
rmap Q (# F h) (τ y z h') = τ y x (rmap P h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x, z: C₁
h: C₁ ⟦ z, x ⟧
h': P y z
rmap Q (# F h) (τ y z h') = rmap Q (# F h) (τ y z h')

    apply idpath.

(w x y
 z : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)

      ⟦ x, z ⟧) (s : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂),
is_hor_cylinder (s ⋆h id_h_square_bicat v₂) s
  (runitor h₁) (runitor h₂)

∏ (y : C₃) (x : C₁) (h : P y x),
(runitor G ▿s τ ⋆h id_h_square_bicat Q) y x h =

(h' : id_h C₃ (pr1 (y,, x)) y0),

(h' : id_h C₃ (pr1 (y,, x)) y0),

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
τ y x
  (runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_profunctor C₃) z h
        h')) =
runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ
     (id_v_profunctor_square G) y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_profunctor C₃) z h
        h'))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
τ y x (lmap P h' h) =
runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ
     (id_v_profunctor_square G) y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_profunctor C₃) z h
        h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ
     (id_v_profunctor_square G) y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_profunctor C₃) z h
        h')) = τ y x (lmap P h' h)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ
     (id_v_profunctor_square G) y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_profunctor C₃) z h
        h')) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = τ y x (lmap P h' h)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ
     (id_v_profunctor_square G) y x
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_profunctor C₃) z h
        h')) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor τ
  (id_v_profunctor_square G) y x
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P (id_profunctor C₃) z h h') =
?t2

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm τ (id_v_profunctor_square G) y x z h h').
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q (id_profunctor C₄) (G z)
     (τ z x h) (id_v_profunctor_square G y z h')) =
τ y x (lmap P h' h)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q (G y) (F x)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q (id_profunctor C₄) (G z)
     (τ z x h) (# G h')) = τ y x (lmap P h' h)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
lmap Q (# G h') (τ z x h) = τ y x (lmap P h' h)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
P: profunctor C₁ C₃
Q: profunctor C₂ C₄
τ: profunctor_square G F P Q
y: C₃
x: C₁
z: C₃
h: P z x
h': C₃ ⟦ y, z ⟧
lmap Q (# G h') (τ z x h) = lmap Q (# G h') (τ z x h)

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁
 z₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(h₃ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₁
 v₁' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂
 v₂' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧)
(w₁
 w₁' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(w₂
 w₂' : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
         univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) (τ₁ : v₁ ==> v₁') (τ₂ : v₂ ==> v₂')
(θ₁ : w₁ ==> w₁') (θ₂ : w₂ ==> w₂')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ w₁)
(s₁' : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁' w₁')
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂ w₂)
(s₂' : square_double_bicat h₂ h₃ v₂' w₂'),
is_ver_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
→ is_ver_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
  → is_ver_cylinder (s₁ ⋆v s₂) (s₁' ⋆v s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁)
      (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)

x₂: C₁
h: (P₁ · P₁') x₁ x₂
∏ (y : C₃) (h : P₁ y (pr2 (x₁,, x₂)))
(h' : P₁' (pr1 (x₁,, x₂)) y),
(τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ◃s s₁' ⋆v s₂') x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' y h h') =
(θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂) x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' y h h')

x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
∏ (y : C₃) (h : P₁ y (pr2 (x₁,, x₂)))
(h' : P₁' (pr1 (x₁,, x₂)) y),
(τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ◃s s₁' ⋆v s₂') x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' y h h') =
(θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁ ▹s s₁ ⋆v s₂) x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' y h h')

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' x₁ x₂
  (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₂ τ₂ x₁ x₂
     (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor τ₁ P₁' x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h'))) =
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ x₁)
     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h')))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' x₁ x₂
  (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₂ τ₂ x₁ x₂
     (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor τ₁ P₁' x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h'))) = 
?b

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'

θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'

rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
?b =
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ x₁)
     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h')))

  (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor P₂ τ₂ x₁ x₂

τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'

s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'

q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =

x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor τ₁ P₁' x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h') = ?t2

      exact (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_comm τ₁ P₁' h h').

x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₂' x₃ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h')) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
?b =
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ x₁)
     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h')))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁' s₂' x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₂ P₂' x₃ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h')) = ?b

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
               s₁' s₂'
               x₁ x₂ x₃
               (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h) (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h')).

s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =

q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ x₁)
     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h')))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ x₁)
     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h'))) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

  (F₁ x₂)

     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h'))) = 
?b

h': P₁' x₁ x₃

  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ x₁)
     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂
        (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h'))) = 
?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
comp_v_profunctor_square_mor s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in P₁ P₁' x₃ h h') = ?t2

      exact (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm s₁ s₂ x₁ x₂ x₃ h h').

x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ x₁)
     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₁' (F₂ x₃)
        (s₁ x₃ x₂ h) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h'))) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

  (F₁ x₂)

     (F₁ x₂)
     (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₁' (F₂ x₃)

P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor θ₁ Q₁' (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₁ Q₁' (F₂ x₃) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)
     (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) = ?t2

      exact (rwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_comm
               θ₁ Q₁'
               (s₁ x₃ x₂ h) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₁' (F₂ (pr1 (x₃,, x₂)))
     (θ₁ (F₂ (pr1 (x₃,, x₂))) (F₁ (pr2 (x₃,, x₂)))
        (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₁' (F₂ x₃)
     (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'

θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₁' (F₂ x₃)
     (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
?b =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor Q₂ θ₂ (F₃ x₁)
  (F₁ x₂)
  (comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₁' (F₂ x₃)
     (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
?b

      exact (lwhisker_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_comm
               Q₂ θ₂
               (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ (pr1 (x₁,, x₃))) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
p':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise p h: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' x₃ x₂ h =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ x₃ x₂ h
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
p':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise p h: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' x₃ x₂ h =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ x₃ x₂ h
q':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise q h': lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' x₁ x₃ h' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ x₁ x₃ h'
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
p':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise p h: s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h) =
θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)
q':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise q h': s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h') =
θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h)) (s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆
P₁, P₂: profunctor C₁ C₃
P₁', P₂': profunctor C₃ C₅
Q₁, Q₂: profunctor C₂ C₄
Q₁', Q₂': profunctor C₄ C₆
τ₁: profunctor_nat_trans P₁ P₂
τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'
s₁: profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₁ Q₁
s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
p':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise p h: s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h) =
θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)
q':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise q h': s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h') =
θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category

F₃: C₅ ⟶ C₆

τ₂: profunctor_nat_trans P₁' P₂'
θ₁: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁ Q₂
θ₂: profunctor_nat_trans Q₁' Q₂'

s₁': profunctor_square F₂ F₁ P₂ Q₂
s₂: profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₁' Q₁'
s₂': profunctor_square F₃ F₂ P₂' Q₂'
p: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁
q: lwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' =
rwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂
x₁: C₅
x₂: C₁
x₃: C₃
h: P₁ x₃ x₂
h': P₁' x₁ x₃
p':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise p h: s₁' x₃ x₂ (τ₁ x₃ x₂ h) =
θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h)
q':= profunctor_square_eq_pointwise q h': s₂' x₁ x₃ (τ₂ x₁ x₃ h') =
θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h')) =
comp_profunctor_ob_in Q₂ Q₂' (F₂ x₃)
  (θ₁ (F₂ x₃) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₃ x₂ h))
  (θ₂ (F₃ x₁) (F₂ x₃) (s₂ x₁ x₃ h'))

    apply idpath.
  
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂
 y₃ : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker)
(h₁
 h₁' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂
 h₂' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(k₁
 k₁' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(k₂
 k₂' : univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
       ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₁ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
        univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
      ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧) (τ₁ : h₁ ==> h₁') (τ₂ : h₂ ==> h₂')
(θ₁ : k₁ ==> k₁') (θ₂ : k₂ ==> k₂')
(s₁ : square_double_bicat h₁ k₁ v₁ v₂)
(s₁' : square_double_bicat h₁' k₁' v₁ v₂)
(s₂ : square_double_bicat h₂ k₂ v₂ v₃)
(s₂' : square_double_bicat h₂' k₂' v₂ v₃),
is_hor_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
→ is_hor_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
  → is_hor_cylinder (s₁ ⋆h s₂) (s₁' ⋆h s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁)
      (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
F₁, F₂: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
F₃, P₁: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
P₂, P₁': univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ C₄, C₅ ⟧
P₂', Q₁: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ C₅, C₆ ⟧
Q₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ C₁, C₄ ⟧
Q₁': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ C₂, C₅ ⟧
Q₂': ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ C₃, C₆ ⟧
τ₁: F₁ ==> F₂
τ₂: F₃ ==> P₁
θ₁: P₂ ==> P₁'
θ₂: P₂' ==> Q₁
s₁: square_double_bicat F₁ P₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': square_double_bicat F₂ P₁' Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: square_double_bicat F₃ P₂' Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': square_double_bicat P₁ Q₁ Q₁' Q₂'
is_hor_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
→ is_hor_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
  → is_hor_cylinder (s₁ ⋆h s₂) (s₁' ⋆h s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁)
      (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧

⟦ C₁, C₄ ⟧

q: is_hor_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
is_hor_cylinder (s₁ ⋆h s₂) (s₁' ⋆h s₂') (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁)
  (θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁)

τ₁: F₁ ==> F₂

p: is_hor_cylinder s₁ s₁' τ₁ θ₁
q: is_hor_cylinder s₂ s₂' τ₂ θ₂
∏ (y : C₄) (x : C₁) (h : Q₂ y x),
(θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁ ▿s s₁ ⋆h s₂) y x h =
(τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▵s s₁' ⋆h s₂') y x h

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
lmap Q₂'
  (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 P₁' x₁) · # (pr1 P₂') (pr1 θ₁ x₁))
  (s₂ (P₂ x₁) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h)) =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃

s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'

uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
lmap Q₂' (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 P₁' x₁))
  (lmap Q₂' (# (pr1 P₂') (pr1 θ₁ x₁))
     (s₂ (P₂ x₁) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h))) =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

  (s₂ (P₂ x₁) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h)) = ?t2

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category

x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
?t2 =
lmap Q₂' (# (pr1 P₂') (pr1 θ₁ x₁))
  (s₂ (P₂ x₁) (F₁ x₂) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h))

      apply (profunctor_square_lmap s₂).

  (s₂ (pr1 P₁' x₁) (pr1 F₁ x₂)
     (lmap Q₁' (pr1 θ₁ x₁) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h))) =

F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅

τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃

p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
lmap Q₂' (pr1 θ₂ (pr1 P₁' x₁))
  (s₂ (pr1 P₁' x₁) (pr1 F₁ x₂)
     (lmap Q₁' (pr1 θ₁ x₁) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h))) = ?b

      apply (profunctor_square_eq_pointwise q).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'

s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂' (pr1 P₁' x₁)
  (pr1 F₁ x₂) (lmap Q₁' (pr1 θ₁ x₁) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h)) =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆

τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'

uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
rmap Q₂' (τ₂ (pr1 F₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (pr1 P₁' x₁) (pr1 F₁ x₂)
     (lmap Q₁' (pr1 θ₁ x₁) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h))) =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
rmap Q₂' (τ₂ (pr1 F₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (pr1 P₁' x₁) (pr1 F₁ x₂)
     (lmap Q₁' (pr1 θ₁ x₁) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h))) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
?b =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
rmap Q₂' (τ₂ (pr1 F₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (pr1 P₁' x₁) (pr1 F₁ x₂)
     (lmap Q₁' (pr1 θ₁ x₁) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h))) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
lmap Q₁' (pr1 θ₁ x₁) (s₁ x₁ x₂ h) = ?t2

      exact (profunctor_square_eq_pointwise p h).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
rmap Q₂' (τ₂ (pr1 F₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (pr1 P₁' x₁) (pr1 F₁ x₂)
     (uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁' x₁ x₂ h)) =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
rmap Q₂' (τ₂ (pr1 F₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (pr1 P₁' x₁) (pr1 F₁ x₂)
     (rmap Q₁' (τ₁ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))) =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
rmap Q₂' (τ₂ (pr1 F₁ x₂))
  (rmap Q₂' (# P₁ (τ₁ x₂))
     (s₂' (pr1 P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))) =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
rmap Q₂' (# P₁ (τ₁ x₂) · τ₂ (pr1 F₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (pr1 P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h)) =
rmap Q₂' (pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂))
  (s₂' (P₁' x₁) (F₂ x₂) (s₁' x₁ x₂ h))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
# P₁ (τ₁ x₂) · τ₂ (pr1 F₁ x₂) =
pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅, C₆: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₃, P₁: C₂ ⟶ C₃
P₂, P₁': C₄ ⟶ C₅
P₂', Q₁: C₅ ⟶ C₆
Q₂: profunctor C₁ C₄
Q₁': profunctor C₂ C₅
Q₂': profunctor C₃ C₆
τ₁: F₂ ⟹ F₁
τ₂: P₁ ⟹ F₃
θ₁: P₁' ⟹ P₂
θ₂: Q₁ ⟹ P₂'
s₁: profunctor_square P₂ F₁ Q₂ Q₁'
s₁': profunctor_square P₁' F₂ Q₂ Q₁'
s₂: profunctor_square P₂' F₃ Q₁' Q₂'
s₂': profunctor_square Q₁ P₁ Q₁' Q₂'
p: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₁ s₁ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₁ s₁'
q: dwhisker_profunctor_square θ₂ s₂ =
uwhisker_profunctor_square τ₂ s₂'
x₁: C₄
x₂: C₁
h: Q₂ x₁ x₂
τ₂ (F₂ x₂) · # F₃ (τ₁ x₂) =
pr1 τ₂ (pr1 F₂ x₂) · # (pr1 F₃) (pr1 τ₁ x₂)

    apply idpath.
Qed.

  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker


double_bicat_laws
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

whisker_square_bicat_law

 exact univcat_profunctor_whisker_square_bicat_law.

w, x, y, z: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
h₁: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
⟦ x, z ⟧
isaset (square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂)

    apply isaset_profunctor_square.
Qed.

(** * 5. The Verity double bicategory of univalent categories and profunctors *)

verity_double_bicat


verity_double_bicat

  
ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
double_bicat_laws ?B

  
ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker.
  
double_bicat_laws
  univcat_profunctor_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact univcat_profunctor_double_bicat_laws.
Defined.

(** * 6. 2-cells versus squares *)

vertically_saturated
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat


vertically_saturated
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
isweq vertical_cell_to_square

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
profunctor_square (functor_identity C₂)
  (functor_identity C₁) P Q → profunctor_nat_trans P Q
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
∏ x : profunctor_nat_trans P Q,
?g (vertical_cell_to_square x) = x
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
∏
y : profunctor_square (functor_identity C₂)
      (functor_identity C₁) P Q,
vertical_cell_to_square (?g y) = y

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
profunctor_square (functor_identity C₂)
  (functor_identity C₁) P Q → profunctor_nat_trans P Q
 exact profunctor_square_to_profunctor_nat_trans.
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
∏ x : profunctor_nat_trans P Q,
profunctor_square_to_profunctor_nat_trans
  (vertical_cell_to_square x) = x
 abstract
      (intros τ ;
       use eq_profunctor_nat_trans ;
       intros y x h ; cbn ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
P, Q: profunctor C₁ C₂
∏
y : profunctor_square (functor_identity C₂)
      (functor_identity C₁) P Q,
vertical_cell_to_square
  (profunctor_square_to_profunctor_nat_trans y) = y
 abstract
      (intros τ ;
       use eq_profunctor_square ;
       intros y x h ; cbn ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.


horizontally_saturated
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat


horizontally_saturated
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isweq horizontal_cell_to_square

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square G F (id_profunctor C₁)
  (id_profunctor C₂) → G ⟹ F
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ x : G ⟹ F, ?g (horizontal_cell_to_square x) = x
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏
y : profunctor_square G F (id_profunctor C₁)
      (id_profunctor C₂),
horizontal_cell_to_square (?g y) = y

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square G F (id_profunctor C₁)
  (id_profunctor C₂) → G ⟹ F
 exact profunctor_square_to_nat_trans.
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ x : G ⟹ F,
profunctor_square_to_nat_trans
  (horizontal_cell_to_square x) = x
 abstract
      (intro τ ;
       use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
       intro x ; cbn ;
       rewrite functor_id ;
       rewrite !id_left ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏
y : profunctor_square G F (id_profunctor C₁)
      (id_profunctor C₂),
horizontal_cell_to_square
  (profunctor_square_to_nat_trans y) = y
 abstract
      (intros τ ;
       use eq_profunctor_square ;
       intros x y f ; cbn in * ;
       rewrite !id_left ;
       pose (profunctor_square_natural τ f (identity y) (identity y)) as p ;
       cbn in p ;
       rewrite functor_id in p ;
       rewrite !id_right in p ;
       exact (!p)).
Defined.


is_weak_double_cat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat


is_weak_double_cat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat

  
vertically_saturated
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
horizontally_saturated
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat

  
vertically_saturated
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
 exact univcat_profunctor_vertically_saturated.
  
horizontally_saturated
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
 exact univcat_profunctor_horizontally_saturated.
Defined.

(** * 7. Companion pairs of profunctors *)

all_companions univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat


all_companions univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
are_companions F (representable_profunctor_left F)

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square (functor_identity C₂) F
  (representable_profunctor_left F) (id_profunctor C₂)
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square F (functor_identity C₁)
  (id_profunctor C₁) (representable_profunctor_left F)
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
rwhisker_profunctor_square
  (runitor_profunctor_nat_trans
     (representable_profunctor_left F))
  (lwhisker_profunctor_square
     (linvunitor_profunctor_nat_trans
        (representable_profunctor_left F))
     (comp_v_profunctor_square ?Goal0 ?Goal)) =
id_h_profunctor_square
  (representable_profunctor_left F)
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
dwhisker_profunctor_square (nat_trans_id F)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square (nat_trans_id F)
     (comp_h_profunctor_square ?Goal0 ?Goal)) =
id_v_profunctor_square F

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square (functor_identity C₂) F
  (representable_profunctor_left F) (id_profunctor C₂)
 apply representable_profunctor_left_unit.
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square F (functor_identity C₁)
  (id_profunctor C₁) (representable_profunctor_left F)
 apply representable_profunctor_left_counit.
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
rwhisker_profunctor_square
  (runitor_profunctor_nat_trans
     (representable_profunctor_left F))
  (lwhisker_profunctor_square
     (linvunitor_profunctor_nat_trans
        (representable_profunctor_left F))
     (comp_v_profunctor_square
        (representable_profunctor_left_counit F)
        (representable_profunctor_left_unit F))) =
id_h_profunctor_square
  (representable_profunctor_left F)
 abstract
      (use eq_profunctor_square ;
       intros y x h ; cbn in * ;
       etrans ;
       [ apply maponpaths ;
         apply (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
                  (representable_profunctor_left_counit F)
                  (representable_profunctor_left_unit F))
       | ] ;
       rewrite runitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_comm ;
       cbn ;
       rewrite !functor_id ;
       rewrite !id_right ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
dwhisker_profunctor_square (nat_trans_id F)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square (nat_trans_id F)
     (comp_h_profunctor_square
        (representable_profunctor_left_counit F)
        (representable_profunctor_left_unit F))) =
id_v_profunctor_square F
 abstract
      (use eq_profunctor_square ;
       intros y x h ; cbn in * ;
       rewrite !id_left, !id_right ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.


all_conjoints univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat


all_conjoints univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
are_conjoints F (representable_profunctor_right F)

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square (functor_identity C₁) F
  (id_profunctor C₁)
  (representable_profunctor_right F)
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square F (functor_identity C₂)
  (representable_profunctor_right F)
  (id_profunctor C₂)
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
lwhisker_profunctor_square
  (rinvunitor_profunctor_nat_trans
     (representable_profunctor_right F))
  (rwhisker_profunctor_square
     (lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans
        (representable_profunctor_right F))
     (comp_v_profunctor_square ?Goal0 ?Goal)) =
id_h_profunctor_square
  (representable_profunctor_right F)
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
dwhisker_profunctor_square (nat_trans_id F)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square (nat_trans_id F)
     (comp_h_profunctor_square ?Goal ?Goal0)) =
id_v_profunctor_square F

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square (functor_identity C₁) F
  (id_profunctor C₁)
  (representable_profunctor_right F)
 apply representable_profunctor_right_unit.
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
profunctor_square F (functor_identity C₂)
  (representable_profunctor_right F)
  (id_profunctor C₂)
 apply representable_profunctor_right_counit.
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
lwhisker_profunctor_square
  (rinvunitor_profunctor_nat_trans
     (representable_profunctor_right F))
  (rwhisker_profunctor_square
     (lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans
        (representable_profunctor_right F))
     (comp_v_profunctor_square
        (representable_profunctor_right_counit F)
        (representable_profunctor_right_unit F))) =
id_h_profunctor_square
  (representable_profunctor_right F)
 abstract
      (use eq_profunctor_square ;
       intros y x h ; cbn in * ;
       etrans ;
       [ apply maponpaths ;
         apply (comp_v_profunctor_square_mor_comm
                  (representable_profunctor_right_counit F)
                  (representable_profunctor_right_unit F))
       | ] ;
       rewrite lunitor_profunctor_nat_trans_mor_comm ;
       cbn ;
       rewrite !functor_id ;
       rewrite !id_left ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
dwhisker_profunctor_square (nat_trans_id F)
  (uwhisker_profunctor_square (nat_trans_id F)
     (comp_h_profunctor_square
        (representable_profunctor_right_unit F)
        (representable_profunctor_right_counit F))) =
id_v_profunctor_square F
 abstract
      (use eq_profunctor_square ;
       intros y x h ; cbn in * ;
       rewrite !id_left, !id_right ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.

 ⟧) ==> Q

τ • inv_profunctor_nat_trans Hτ = id₂ P
 apply inv_profunctor_nat_trans_right.

 apply inv_profunctor_nat_trans_left.

C₁, C₂: univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
τ: (P
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
   univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
 ⟧) ==> Q
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
y: C₂
x: C₁
h: Q y x
P y x

      exact ((Hτ^-1 : profunctor_nat_trans _ _) y x h).
    
C₁, C₂: univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
τ: (P
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
   univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
 ⟧) ==> Q
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ x0 : P y x,
(λ h : Q y x,
 (Hτ ^-1 : profunctor_nat_trans Q P) y x h) (τ y x x0) =
x0
 abstract
        (intros h ; cbn ;
         exact (profunctor_nat_trans_eq_pointwise (vcomp_rinv Hτ) h)).
    
C₁, C₂: univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
τ: (P
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
   univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
 ⟧) ==> Q
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y0 : Q y x,
τ y x
  ((λ h : Q y x,
    (Hτ ^-1 : profunctor_nat_trans Q P) y x h) y0) =
y0
 abstract
        (intros h ; cbn ;
         exact (profunctor_nat_trans_eq_pointwise (vcomp_linv Hτ) h)).
  
C₁, C₂: univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
τ: (P
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
   univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
 ⟧) ==> Q
isaprop (is_profunctor_nat_iso τ)
 apply isaprop_is_profunctor_nat_iso.
  
C₁, C₂: univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
τ: (P
 :
 ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
   univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
 ⟧) ==> Q
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell τ)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
Defined.

(** * 9. The local univalence of the Verity double bicategory of squares *)

ver_locally_univalent
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat


ver_locally_univalent
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat

  
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
isweq (idtoiso_2_1 P Q)

  
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
P = Q ≃ invertible_2cell P Q
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
?w ~ idtoiso_2_1 P Q

  
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
P = Q ≃ invertible_2cell P Q
 exact (weqfibtototal _ _ profunctor_nat_iso_weq_vertible_invertible_2cell
           ∘ path_profunctor_weq_profunctor_nat_iso P Q)%weq.
  
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
(weqfibtototal is_profunctor_nat_iso
   is_invertible_2cell
   profunctor_nat_iso_weq_vertible_invertible_2cell
 ∘ path_profunctor_weq_profunctor_nat_iso P Q)%weq ~
idtoiso_2_1 P Q
 
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P, Q: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
p: P = Q
(weqfibtototal is_profunctor_nat_iso
   is_invertible_2cell
   profunctor_nat_iso_weq_vertible_invertible_2cell
 ∘ path_profunctor_weq_profunctor_nat_iso P Q)%weq p =
idtoiso_2_1 P Q p

    
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
(weqfibtototal is_profunctor_nat_iso
   is_invertible_2cell
   profunctor_nat_iso_weq_vertible_invertible_2cell
 ∘ path_profunctor_weq_profunctor_nat_iso P P)%weq
  (idpath P) = idtoiso_2_1 P P (idpath P)

    
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
pr1
  ((weqfibtototal is_profunctor_nat_iso
      is_invertible_2cell
      profunctor_nat_iso_weq_vertible_invertible_2cell
    ∘ path_profunctor_weq_profunctor_nat_iso P P)%weq
     (idpath P)) = pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 P P (idpath P))

    
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

      
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
x: P ==> P
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x)

      apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
    
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
pr1
  ((weqfibtototal is_profunctor_nat_iso
      is_invertible_2cell
      profunctor_nat_iso_weq_vertible_invertible_2cell
    ∘ path_profunctor_weq_profunctor_nat_iso P P)%weq
     (idpath P)) = pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 P P (idpath P))

    
C₁, C₂: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat
P: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  univcat_profunctor_verity_double_bicat ⟦ C₁, C₂
⟧
profunctor_nat_trans_id P = profunctor_nat_trans_id P

    apply idpath.
Qed.
